description: SDK previously fetched and cached the schema by uri@digest. Subsequent fetch returns 404 (CDN flap / origin partition). SDK MUST serve the cached body — uri@digest is immutable per the contract.
rationale: Cache is keyed by uri@digest, treated as immutable per the contract. SDK MUST serve cached body on transient origin failure; degrading the entire session for a 404 punishes downstream buyers for a network blip.
